hero.title: Dalaman Airport Transfer
hero.subtitle: Safe, comfortable and on-time airport transfer service

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.desc: Book your safe and comfortable transfer in just a few steps.

step1.title: Choose Route
step1.desc: Enter your pickup, drop-off location and date / time.

step2.title: Select Vehicle
step2.desc: Choose the vehicle class and price that suits your needs.

step3.title: Confirm
step3.desc: Fill in your details and complete your payment.

step4.title: Enjoy the Ride
step4.desc: Your driver will be ready at the agreed time.

featuresExt.title: Why Travel With Us?
featuresExt.desc: Our professional team and modern fleet make every journey comfortable.

f2.title: Safe Travel
f2.desc: Insured vehicles and licensed professional drivers.

f3.title: On Time
f3.desc: Flight tracking ensures you are met without delays.

f4.title: Wide Coverage
f4.desc: Transfers to airports, hotels and all regions.

f5.title: Transparent Pricing
f5.desc: Fixed price at booking time, no hidden fees.

f6.title: 24/7 Support
f6.desc: Customer support available day and night.

t1.name: James R.
t1.text: Excellent service! The driver was right on time and the vehicle was spotless. My go-to choice every trip.

t2.name: Sophia K.
t2.text: Had a wonderful experience on our family holiday. Perfect for travelling with kids — reliable and comfortable.

t3.name: Michael T.
t3.text: We use them for all of our company's transfer needs. Professionalism and reliability combined.

footer.desc: Reliable, comfortable and on-time transfer service between Dalaman Airport and regional hotels.

comfort.title: Comfortable
comfort.desc: Sedan, VIP Vito and Minibus options
